subcodes.first_line: O Letter Jim! Hearken unto that which the Word of God doth speak from within the prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حرف الجیم ان استمع ما تنطق به کلمه الله فی السجن
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
